## Summary
- Section: <!-- articles | training | future section -->
- Content type: update to existing Markdown content
- Update type: <!-- routine refresh | correction | major rewrite -->
- Intended audience: <!-- internal reviewers, public readers, training buyers, etc. -->
- Publication intent: <!-- merge when approved | coordinate publication window -->

## Update checklist
- [ ] I updated an existing Markdown file under `content/articles/` or `content/training/`
- [ ] I reviewed the frontmatter and body for consistency with the current section requirements
- [ ] I noted whether this should also carry the manual `type:correction` label
- [ ] I described any reviewer follow-up needed below

## Reviewer notes
- Reason for the update:
- Editorial considerations:
- Sources or supporting links:
- Requested publication timing:
